zh.lifeSummary: 當William Greville於1464年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Richard Greville34歲，母親Elizabeth Herbert29歲。他於1494年與Margery Arrell在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他於1510年在英國格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆被列為kings justice of the common pleas。他去世於1513年3月6日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾洛維爾 萊明頓享年49歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Greville于1464年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Richard Greville34岁，母亲Elizabeth Herbert29岁。他于1494年与Margery Arrell在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他于1510年在英国格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆被列为kings justice of the common pleas。他去世于1513年3月6日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾洛維爾 萊明頓享年49岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Greville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Gréville (Manche), common in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Greville was born in 1464, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Greville, was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth Herbert, was 29. He married Margery Arrell in 1494, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. In 1510, his occupation is listed as kings justice of the common pleas in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England. He died on 6 March 1513, in Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Greville est né en 1464, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Greville, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Herbert, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margery Arrell en 1494, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. En 1510, sa profession de son indiquée est kings justice of the common pleas à Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 6 mars 1513, à Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Greville 1464 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Greville 34 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Herbert 29. Er hat 1494 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Margery Arrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. 1510 ist sein Beruf als kings justice of the common pleas in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. März 1513 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Greville è nato il nel 1464 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Greville, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Herbert, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margery Arrell nel 1494, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Nel 1510, la sua occupazione è indicata come kings justice of the common pleas nel Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England. Morì il 6 marzo 1513, nel Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Grevilleが1464年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Grevilleは34歳，母Elizabeth Herbertは29歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターでMargery Arrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。1510年，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェルテンハムでの職業はkings justice of the common pleasと記録されている。彼は1513年3月6日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロウエル レミントンで49歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェルテンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Greville(이)가 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Greville(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Herbert(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 Margery Arrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1510년, 그의 직업은 영국 그루스스터실르 헬텐함에서 kings justice of the common pleas이었다. 그는 1513년 3월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 로어 러밍턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 헬텐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Greville nasceu em 1464, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Greville, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Herbert, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Arrell em 1494, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Em 1510, sua profissão aparece como kings justice of the common pleas em Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 6 de março de 1513, em Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Upper Lemington Manor, Gloucestershire,: Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Greville родился в 1464 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Greville было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Herbert, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Arrell в 1494 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. В 1510 году он работал по профессии kings justice of the common pleas в местности челтенам, глоусестиршир, Англия. Он умер 6 марта 1513 г. в местности лоуир лемингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности челтенам, глоусестиршир, Англия.
